mapper.insert: insert into mirror (name, url_inter, url_out, size, time, arch, manufacturer, series) values (#{name}, #{urlInter}, #{urlOut}, #{size}, #{time}, #{arch}, #{manufacturer}, #{series})
mapper.update: update mirror set name = #{name}, url_inter = #{urlInter}, url_out = #{urlOut}, size = #{size}, time = #{time}, arch = #{arch}, manufacturer = #{manufacturer}, series = #{series} where id = #{id}
